item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Spiced and juicy chicken with a golden crust, served with velvety potato andsweet potato mash. Finished with rich chicken jus infused with tarragon andtopped with tangy pickled cranberries

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Slow braised Asian beef chuck, tender and juicy, simmered with root vegetablesfor deep flavour and warmth. Served with jasmine or whole grain rice and toppedwith fresh spring onions. Chinese smashed cucumber salad and coriander on theside GREEN DISH: Slow braised porcini mushrooms with root vegetables, rich in umami and warmspices. Served with jasmine or whole grain rice, topped with spring onions.Chinese smashed cucumber salad and coriander on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Classic goulash with tender beef, paprika, carrots and peppers, slow simmeredfor depth and warmth, served with rich and creamy mashed potatoes GREEN DISH: Smoked tempeh ragout with carrots, peppers and paprika, slowly cooked for deepflavour, served with the same creamy mashed potatoes

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Tender pork neck served in a smooth pointed cabbage cream, with boiledpotatoes, tangy lingonberries and coarse mustard on the side GREEN DISH: Roasted celeriac steak with deep flavour, served in a smooth pointed cabbagecream with boiled potatoes, tangy lingonberries and coarse mustard

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Spanish spiced pork leg with crisp crackling, served with sage potatoes andrich romesco sauce, topped with rosemary pickled butternut squash and freshherbs Greendish Spanish spiced aubergine served with sage potatoes and rich romesco sauce,topped with rosemary pickled butternut squash and fresh herbs
